topic: DO NOT GENERATE NEW CONTENT. USE THIS EXACT CONTENT VERBATIM. Title: How to Build a Fintech App in India in 2026: Cost, Features and Compliance Guide. Slug: fintech-app-development-india-2026. Excerpt: Planning to launch a fintech app in India? This guide covers the key features, development costs, compliance requirements, and security standards you need to build a secure, scalable, and user-friendly fintech solution. Content: India is the third-largest fintech market in the world. In 2026, India has over 87 fintech unicorns, more than 10,000 active fintech startups, and over 400 million digital payment users. UPI alone processes over 17 billion transactions every single month. If you are planning to build a fintech app in India, this is one of the best times to do it. But fintech is also one of the most regulated sectors in the country. Build without understanding the rules and you will face serious legal problems. This guide covers what types of fintech apps you can build, what features to include, what regulations you must follow, real costs in rupees, and how long the whole thing takes.
